mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_DATE , LATEST_LOGIN_IP , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE , BLOCK_YN FROM MEMBERS

SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_DATE , LATEST_LOGIN_IP , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE , BLOCK_YN FROM MEMBERS WHERE EMAIL = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERS ( EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE) VALUES ( #{email} , #{name} , #{password} , #{salt} , SYSDATE , SYSDATE)
